channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Ship a remote-ready African dev portfolio
item.description: Cut hiring loop drop-off 70% with a 200-line portfolio artifact — Flask API, Next.js dashboard, GitHub Actions, Redis 7.2, Railway $5/month, and a failure story that hiring managers actually read.

item.title: Pick WebSocket, SSE, or long-polling: the right tool for real-time
item.description: Cut realtime overhead 60%: choose WebSockets vs SSE vs long-polling for your stack — latency, memory, and cost data from Node 20 and Redis 7.2 in production

item.title: Stop tuning pool size 50
item.description: Cut response time 78% and save $9/month by ditching the 'pool size 50' default — real formulas, benchmarks, and code for PostgreSQL 16 and Node 20 LTS in 2026.

item.title: Decode your codebase with AI repository intelligence
item.description: Cut AI hallucinations 85% by indexing your codebase as a searchable knowledge graph — not a flat text dump. Concrete tools, benchmarks, and the hidden context gap most teams miss.

item.title: Ship real SaaS without senior devs
item.description: Ship a real product in 30 minutes with AI tools in 2026 — GitHub Copilot Workspace, Railway.app, and Neon.tech cut dev time 67% and costs $12/month for 10k users.

item.title: Pick no-code—or pay later?
item.description: Choose wisely: 40% faster demos with no-code vs 60% lower long-term costs writing custom code — data from 2026 projects shows where each path wins

item.title: 10 AI skills that boost salaries in 2026
item.description: Cut your LLM API bill 40% and raise your salary 19%: prompt optimization vs RAG tuning with 2026 job data, latency benchmarks, and cost breakdown.

item.title: Build 5G-ready backends: latency tricks you can't
item.description: Cut API response time 50% on 5G: the exact TCP, Redis, and cache TTL tweaks most teams miss. 2026 cellular backend guide with Prometheus queries and Docker setup.

item.title: Ship 3 projects right, not 10 wrong
item.description: Ship 3 small projects in a weekend, not 10 wrong ones over months. Real examples, concrete numbers, and the hiring signals that actually move the needle in 2026 remote roles from Africa.

item.title: When Postgres beats vector DBs
item.description: Cut vector search latency 90% with pgvector 0.7 on Postgres 16.2 — 5ms vs 50ms benchmarks, $1,200 monthly savings, and the SQL trick that beats dedicated vector DBs

item.title: Choose SSE, WebSockets, or Long Polling
item.description: Cut AWS bill 59% by choosing SSE over WebSockets — benchmarked latency, memory, and cost for 1 k concurrent users on t3.medium in 2026.

item.title: Junior to senior without the CS degree
item.description: They’d insist on 100% test coverage while the production database had 17 tables with no foreign key constraints.

item.title: Instrument AI pipelines: what to watch
item.description: Cut AI pipeline surprises 87% with 30 lines of OpenTelemetry — trace LLM calls, cache hits, and vector reloads to find real bottlenecks fast.

item.title: Senior engineers flee Big Tech’s iron grip
item.description: That adds latency (5-15 ms) and complexity, but it centralizes ownership.

item.title: AI coding tools that survive real traffic
item.description: This list is the distillation of hundreds of hours testing AI tools in real environments, from solo projects to 5-person startups, with traffic ranging…

item.title: Cut Lambda CO₂ 37% without latency spike
item.description: Cut cloud carbon 37% without slowing apps — Lambda memory tuning, dynamic cache TTL, and cache warming that actually worked

item.title: Fancy stack loses: hard numbers on simplicity
item.description: Cut dashboard response time 60% with PostgreSQL 16 queries and minimal JavaScript — the exact stack that replaced a Node.js 20 microservice plan.

item.title: RAG in prod: why tutorials flop
item.description: Cut RAG latency 89% and AWS bill 73% by tuning pgvector indexes, BRIN filters, and pgBouncer pools — the exact steps most tutorials skip.

item.title: Ask for 80% of US salary as a remote dev in 2026
item.description: Ask for 80% of US salary as a remote dev in 2026 — COL-adjusted benchmarks, email template, and the Hetzner cron job that keeps the data fresh.

item.title: AI indexes your repo: context you never knew you needed
item.description: Cut repository query time 90% with repository intelligence — measure index build time, query latency, and staleness before you choose tooling. Learn what a good index looks like and where grep breaks first.
